brand.name: Pure Purc
brand.voice: raw, first-person MALE story — a guy talking straight to camera about losing his confidence to hair loss and getting his life back; authentic, emotional, no hype
value_props: changed how I feel about myself

segments.name: young_men_confidence
pains: thinning hair is killing my confidence

segments.name: midage_men_comeback
desires: a simple fix that actually works

creative.format: personal transformation story: lost confidence -> changed his life
creative.music: cinematic, emotional, 'cool' background track worth staying for even if they don't buy
creative.notes: Female-led creatives underperform; ALWAYS a male first-person narrator. The emotional music must hold non-buyers to the end (watch-time boosts TikTok ranking), so write to an emotional arc.
